narrative:
07 Ohio House district has 80,686 registered voters, with 58.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.5%, a clear Democratic lean of 9.0 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +8.8% D−R vs +4.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
